title: sclerolaena spinosa
intro: Sclerolaena spinosa, also known as the prickly saltbush, is a shrub-like plant native to Western Australia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sclerolaena spinosa include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses.
